title: JQ Bookcases Curated Decorative Cabinet Hardware Catalog

runtimePolicy.sourcePolicy: Curated and version-controlled; no live scraping or retailer API dependency.
runtimePolicy.imagePolicy: No manufacturer photos, logos, CAD, textures, or marketing copy are bundled without recorded permission.
runtimePolicy.pricePolicy: Reference/list price or quote-only; never represented as a live guaranteed retail price.

families.name: SELECT Rectangular Bar Smooth Cabinet Pull
families.material: metal; manufacturer page does not state base metal in the captured product facts
families.description: A broad-size contemporary family useful as the normalized long-pull baseline and for appliance-scale visual language.
families.reasonForInclusion: Extensive size/finish matrix, dealer channel, and a strong bridge between ordinary cabinet pulls and elongated architectural pulls.
families.verificationCaveat: The official smooth product page links a specification PDF whose file name contains 'Knurled'; re-check the smooth-bar dimension table before releasing production geometry.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Cabinet Latch
families.description: Surface-mounted decorative latch for paired cabinet doors; a credible custom-millwork alternative to ordinary knobs and pulls.
compatibilityRestrictions: Requires a compatible strike/catch relationship and paired-door geometry.
families.reasonForInclusion: Represents the documented return of cabinet catches/latches and expands the taxonomy beyond knobs and pulls.

asset.productionRule: Display real metadata but do not claim exact 3D geometry until the full installation envelope is verified.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

families.name: Modern Aluminum Edge Pull 9898
families.description: A widely distributed professional edge pull with a large size and finish matrix.
families.reasonForInclusion: Covers an enduring minimal/edge-pull category, North American trade distribution, and real metric mounting sizes.

asset.productionRule: Use verified c.c., length, and width. Mark projection/detail as simplified until the full profile drawing is licensed or verified.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

families.name: Modern Metal Pull 1030
families.description: A colorful, sculptural 2026 catalog addition available in compact and standard c.c. sizes.
families.reasonForInclusion: Adds a controlled dose of current color/sculptural trend without making the entire catalog trend-dependent.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Queslett Cup Pull
families.description: A substantial solid-brass cup pull in multiple architectural lengths and hand-applied finishes.
families.reasonForInclusion: Provides a genuine luxury cup-pull family with real dimensions, finish depth, and scale beyond ubiquitous farmhouse bin pulls.

asset.productionRule: Model the verified envelope and mounting spacing, but keep ornamental details neutral unless written permission covers an exact likeness.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

families.name: Queslett Cabinet Knob
families.description: A matching luxury knob family that enables coordinated knob-and-cup schedules.
families.reasonForInclusion: Enables a coherent family-based mixed-hardware experience rather than unrelated product cards.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Pull Bar / Cross
families.material: solid metal; finish-specific construction per manufacturer
families.description: A high-recognition tactile pull with cross-knurl detailing and three substantial sizes.
families.reasonForInclusion: Directly represents the durable tactile/knurled hardware trend with complete technical dimensions.

asset.productionRule: Use a simplified grip texture by default. Exact cross-knurl geometry or branded imagery requires permission.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

families.name: Pull Bar / Linear
families.material: solid metal; finish-specific construction per manufacturer
families.description: A slimmer tactile bar pull with linear detailing and three c.c. sizes.
families.reasonForInclusion: Balances the heavier Cross family with a slimmer elongated profile suited to premium minimal millwork.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: T-Bar / Cross
families.material: solid metal; finish-specific construction per manufacturer
families.description: A tactile T-bar that coordinates with the Cross pull family.
families.reasonForInclusion: Adds a contemporary knob alternative and demonstrates matching-family relationships.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Channing Cup Pull
families.description: A practical, stocked cup-pull family with four mounting sizes and a broad professional finish matrix.
families.reasonForInclusion: Gives the MVP a reliable, affordable cup-pull staple alongside the luxury Queslett family.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Europa Tab Pull
families.description: A practical tab pull in compact through 5-inch mounting sizes.
families.reasonForInclusion: A low-risk professional choice for the minimal/tab-pull category with fully documented dimensions and prices.

imageUsage.productionRule: Do not hotlink or copy manufacturer photography. Use a locally generated neutral render unless written permission is recorded.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.

families.name: Oskar Pull
families.description: A clean curved pull in a broad graduated size family and six manufacturer finishes.
families.reasonForInclusion: A durable, moderately priced curved pull that prevents the MVP from over-indexing on straight bars and luxury pieces.

imageUsage.productionRule: The official 2026 price-list policy requests prior approval for Atlas trademark and image use. Use custom neutral renders unless permission is documented.

asset.productionRule: Use verified dimensions; if a required dimension is absent, downgrade to a neutral placeholder and exclude from the accurate-3D filter.
